translations.Scholiq's personal-data processing activ: Scholiq's personal-data processing activities are recorded in OpenRegister's platform processing-activity register. The Art. 30 register, per-access logging, exports, and access control are provided by OpenRegister; Scholiq contributes its activity catalogue and surfaces it here. Access is restricted to administrators and the privacy officer (FG); non-privileged users are denied by OpenRegister.
translations.OpenRegister is not installed. The proce: OpenRegister is not installed. The processing-activity register and Art. 30 export are provided by OpenRegister and are unavailable until it is installed.
translations.The verwerkingsverantwoordelijke (contro: The verwerkingsverantwoordelijke (controller) identity for the Art. 30 register is maintained centrally in OpenRegister. The school is the controller; configure it once in OpenRegister so it appears on every export and accountability report.
translations.View controller identity & accountabilit: View controller identity & accountability in OpenRegister
translations.Scholiq declares seven processing activi: Scholiq declares seven processing activities. They are seeded into OpenRegister as drafts when the Scholiq register configuration is imported; the privacy officer reviews, amends, and activates them in OpenRegister to make Scholiq processing attributable in the Art. 30 register.
translations.The per-access processing log and the pe: The per-access processing log and the per-subject (betrokkene) inzage extract are produced by OpenRegister, scoped to Scholiq's register, and never contain literal personal data beyond what the data subject is entitled to.
translations.Note: the per-access read log and per-su: Note: the per-access read log and per-subject extract are available now. The aggregate Art. 30 register export to JSON/CSV/PDF is a forthcoming OpenRegister capability; until it lands, the compliance audit pack includes the read-log query result as verwerkingsregister.csv.
translations.Maintain the learner record (incl. encry: Maintain the learner record (incl. encrypted BSN, ECK iD, SchoolID) to deliver education and meet statutory reporting.
translations.Register attendance and report verzuim t: Register attendance and report verzuim to the leerplichtambtenaar / DUO.
translations.Administer assessments and record grades: Administer assessments and record grades and final marks.
translations.Record completed mandatory training and: Record completed mandatory training and capture signed attestations (incl. actor IP) as legal evidence.
translations.Issue, verify, and revoke verifiable cre: Issue, verify, and revoke verifiable credentials (EDCI / Open Badges 3.0).
translations.Exchange learner and result data with DU: Exchange learner and result data with DUO/BRON-ROD, OSO, municipality, and HR systems.
translations.Operate adaptive learning paths and reco: Operate adaptive learning paths and record EU AI Act high-risk decision traces.
translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
translations.User settings will appear here in a futu: User settings will appear here in a future update.

translations.OSO jobs enter 'pending-parent-review' b: OSO jobs enter 'pending-parent-review' before executing. A parent must approve the dossier before it is sent.

translations.Scholiq has delegated this job to the Op: Scholiq has delegated this job to the OpenConnector '{target}' connection. No wire-protocol code runs in Scholiq.
translations.Scholiq queues this job and delegates wi: Scholiq queues this job and delegates wire-protocol execution to the named OpenConnector connection. No Edukoppeling, StUF, OSO-XML, Digikoppeling, or SAML code runs inside Scholiq.
